content.problemStatement: You are given an integer sequence AAA with length NNN. Find the number of ordered pairs of positive integers (a,b)(a, b)(a,b) such that aaa occurs in AAA at least bbb times and bbb occurs in AAA at least aaa times.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 3⋅1063 \cdot 10^63⋅106
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 3⋅1053 \cdot 10^53⋅105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the number of pairs.
